name: mp-correction-asterisk-isolated
rationale: Pure F1.MP asterisk-tolerance test: broker correction uses '2nd mortgage*' shorthand. Distinct from A24 (which has same shape; F15 is intentional overlap per Group A vs Group F overlap principle). Tests R11-A asterisk parser robustness as isolated baseline — assertion focus on regex tolerance, not interaction.
notes: Two-event sequence. Intentional overlap with A24 per Phase 1 overlap principle.
